Doing great, always ready to help! What can I do for you?

We are **ANARVA** — a digital architecture studio that builds high-performance websites, applications, and AI-powered solutions. 🏗️

We bridge the gap between heavy engineering and delicate design. With **15+ projects** delivered across **12+ countries** and a **98% client retention rate**, we specialize in:

• Product Design (UI/UX)
• AI Solutions (RAG, Agents, ML)
• Full-Stack Development (Next.js, React)
• Web3 & Blockchain
• Growth Engineering
• Enterprise Security

Our mission is to simplify complexity — building products that feel intuitive but are powered by industrial-grade engineering.

We offer **6 core services** engineered for modern businesses:

🎨 **Product Design** — UI/UX, Design Systems, Prototyping
🧠 **AI Solutions** — RAG Pipelines, AI Agents, Fine-tuning
💻 **Full-Stack Dev** — Next.js, React, Node.js
🌐 **Web3 & Blockchain** — Smart Contracts, dApps, Solidity
🚀 **Growth Engineering** — SEO, Analytics, CRO
🛡️ **Enterprise Security** — Audits, Compliance, Pen-testing

Want to know more about a specific service? Just ask!

🎨 **Product Design**

We craft intuitive, accessible, and stunning interfaces that convert. Our design process is deeply rooted in user research and data-driven decisions.

**What's included:**
• UI/UX Design & User Research
• Design Systems & Component Libraries
• High-fidelity Prototyping
• Brand Identity & Visual Language
• Responsive & Mobile-first Design

We believe in "weightless interfaces" — designs that don't burden the user but guide them effortlessly to their goal.

🧠 **AI Solutions**

We leverage cutting-edge LLMs and custom ML models to automate workflows and unlock new capabilities.

**What we build:**
• RAG Pipelines for document Q&A
• Custom AI Agents & Chatbots
• LLM Fine-tuning & Prompt Engineering
• Computer Vision Systems
• Predictive Analytics & Forecasting

**Tools we use:** Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, LangChain, OpenAI, NVIDIA NIM, FastAPI

**Notable AI projects:** VendorSync (AI vendor matching), Alzheimer Early Detection (MRI analysis), Refino (Prompt Generator), CyberSentinel.AI (threat detection)

💻 **Full-Stack Development**

We build scalable, secure, and blazing-fast web applications using modern frameworks.

**Tech Stack:**
• Frontend — Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
• Backend — Node.js, Python, FastAPI
• Database — PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis
• Deployment — Vercel, AWS, Docker

**What we deliver:**
• Progressive Web Apps (PWAs)
• Server-side Rendered Applications
• REST & GraphQL APIs
• Real-time WebSocket Applications
• Admin Dashboards & CMS

Every project is built with performance, accessibility, and SEO baked in from day one.

🌐 **Web3 & Blockchain**

Decentralized applications and smart contracts for the next-generation internet.

**What we build:**
• Smart Contracts (Solidity / Rust)
• Decentralized Applications (dApps)
• Token & NFT Platforms
• DeFi Protocols
• Web3 Authentication & Wallets

We help businesses leverage blockchain technology with a focus on security, gas optimization, and seamless user experience.

🚀 **Growth Engineering**

Technical SEO, performance optimization, and analytics integration to drive measurable growth.

**Services include:**
• Technical SEO Audits & Implementation
• Core Web Vitals Optimization
• Analytics & Tracking Setup (GA4, Mixpanel)
• A/B Testing & Conversion Rate Optimization
• Performance Monitoring & Reporting

We don't just build products — we engineer them for growth from the ground up.

🛡️ **Enterprise Security**

Bank-grade security audits and implementation to protect your users and data.

**What we cover:**
• Security Audits & Vulnerability Assessment
• Penetration Testing
• HIPAA / SOC2 / GDPR Compliance
• End-to-end Data Encryption
• Incident Response Protocols

Security isn't an afterthought — it's built into every layer of our development process.

Here are some of our **featured projects**:

🔹 **VendorSync** — AI-powered vendor management platform with predictive analytics
🔹 **CodeViz** — Interactive code visualization platform for programming education
🔹 **Alzheimer Early Detection** — Deep learning MRI analysis with 94% accuracy
🔹 **Deriverse Trading Analytics** — Real-time trading dashboard with AI signals
🔹 **Refino** — AI prompt engineering & generation tool
🔹 **CyberSentinel.AI** — Real-time cybersecurity threat detection platform
🔹 **Secure Q&A** — RAG-based enterprise knowledge assistant
🔹 **WikiQuiz** — AI-powered quiz generation from Wikipedia

Want to know more about a specific project? Just ask!

🔹 **VendorSync** (2025)

An intelligent vendor management platform that leverages AI to automate procurement workflows.

**Key Features:**
• AI-powered vendor matching & scoring
• Real-time inventory synchronization
• Predictive demand forecasting
• Automated invoice processing

**Tech:** Next.js, Python, TensorFlow, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker

🔹 **CodeViz** (2025)

A revolutionary code visualization platform that transforms complex algorithms into interactive animated diagrams.

**Key Features:**
• Real-time algorithm visualization
• Interactive step-by-step debugging
• Multi-language code compilation
• Collaborative learning sessions

**Tech:** React, TypeScript, D3.js, Node.js, WebSocket, MongoDB

🔹 **Alzheimer Early Detection** (2025)

A deep learning diagnostic tool that analyzes MRI brain scans to detect early signs of Alzheimer's disease.

**Key Features:**
• MRI scan analysis with 94% accuracy
• Early-stage biomarker detection
• Patient risk scoring dashboard
• HIPAA-compliant data pipeline

**Tech:** Python, PyTorch, FastAPI, React, OpenCV, AWS

🔹 **Deriverse Trading Analytics** (2024)

A sophisticated trading analytics dashboard with real-time market insights and AI-driven trade signals.

**Key Features:**
• Live market data visualization
• AI-driven trading signals
• Portfolio risk analysis
• Real-time P&L tracking

**Tech:** Next.js, Python, FastAPI, TensorFlow, PostgreSQL, WebSocket

🔹 **Refino — AI Prompt Generator** (2025)

An advanced AI prompt engineering tool that generates optimized, production-grade prompts for any use case.

**Key Features:**
• Smart prompt optimization engine
• Multi-model compatibility
• Context-aware prompt refinement
• One-click prompt templates

**Tech:** Next.js, TypeScript, OpenAI API, Tailwind CSS, Vercel

🔹 **CyberSentinel.AI** (2024)

An AI-powered cybersecurity platform for real-time threat detection and automated incident response.

**Key Features:**
• Real-time threat detection
• Automated incident response
• Network traffic analysis
• Vulnerability assessment reports

**Tech:** Python, TensorFlow, React, Elasticsearch, Kafka, Docker

🔹 **Secure Q&A — Knowledge Assistant** (2025)

An enterprise-grade knowledge assistant using RAG for secure document Q&A with strict data privacy.

**Key Features:**
• RAG-based document Q&A
• End-to-end data encryption
• Multi-format document support
• Citation-backed responses

**Tech:** Python, LangChain, FastAPI, React, ChromaDB, Docker

🔹 **WikiQuiz — Wikipedia Quiz** (2025)

An intelligent quiz generation platform that transforms any Wikipedia article into engaging, adaptive quizzes.

**Key Features:**
• AI-powered quiz generation
• Adaptive difficulty scaling
• Performance analytics dashboard
• Multi-topic quiz history

**Tech:** Next.js, Python, NVIDIA NIM, Tailwind CSS, Vercel

Our development follows a **5-phase protocol** designed for precision and speed:

**01 — Discovery & Strategy**
We dive deep into your goals, audience, and requirements. No code until we understand exactly what you need.

**02 — Wireframing & UX**
Interactive prototypes to nail the user flow before applying visual design.

**03 — UI Design & Build**
High-fidelity design + robust frontend/backend architecture built in parallel.

**04 — QA & Testing**
Rigorous cross-device, cross-browser testing for flawless performance.

**05 — Launch & Scale**
Deployment, post-launch support, and scaling as your user base grows.

This ensures on-time delivery with zero technical compromise.

💰 Our pricing is tailored to each project's scope and complexity. Here are our typical investment ranges:

• **$0 – $5K** → Landing pages, small websites
• **$5K – $10K** → Web apps with basic features
• **$10K – $25K** → Full-stack applications with AI integration
• **$25K – $50K** → Enterprise platforms, complex systems
• **$50K+** → Large-scale, multi-platform solutions

We use a **fixed-output methodology** — meaning you get predictable costs with no surprises. Every project starts with a detailed scope document.

Want to discuss your budget? Let's start a conversation!
